q: How does Nietzsche's will to power differ from Schopenhauer's will to live? Draw on both corpora and cite each.
final:
I couldn’t retrieve the actual sections for either corpus from the available tools, so I can’t responsibly compare them from the documentation base alone.

What I *could* verify is limited:
- The search results identify a Nietzsche hub note, “Ницше — По ту сторону добра и зла,” at https://trip2g.com/ru/hub/nietzsche and a Schopenhauer hub note, “Шопенгауэр — Афоризмы житейской мудрости,” at https://trip2g.com/ru/hub/schopenhauer.
- But the section reads returned empty, so I have no quotable corpus text about “will to power” or “will to live.”
- The federation lookup also reports: “Federation is not configured for kb_id "nietzsche"” and likewise for “schopenhauer.”

So, based on retrieved material, I can’t yet draw the philosophical difference. If you want, I can try a different retrieval path within the trip2g docs, but I’d need corpus text that explicitly discusses those concepts to answer with citations.
